_meta.description: DiffViz instruction export for coding agents

decision_approvals.rationale: Inline diff module contains only dead code (always-empty derive_inline_diff_map) disabled by semantic pairing design. Safe removal.
Fields and builder methods exist for disabled feature. Removing simplifies widget API and reduces dead code paths.
Inline rendering block and function never execute since derive_inline_diff_map always returns empty. Safe to remove.
Builder call would fail after method removal. Dead code path from disabled feature.
